subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath turned and attained unto the grace of God, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, the grace is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی الذی اقبل و فاز بنعمه الله رب العالمین ان النعمه هی
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @call to action
